mapper.select:
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trip WHERE member_id = #{memberId}) AS totalTripCount,
(SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT r.sido_name) FROM conquest_map cm JOIN region r ON cm.region_id = r.region_id WHERE cm.member_id = #{memberId}) AS visitedRegionCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trip WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND status = 'COMPLETED') AS completedTripCount,
(SELECT NVL(AVG(end_date - start_date + 1), 0) FROM trip WHERE member_id = #{memberId}) AS avgTripDays FROM dual
SELECT DISTINCT r.sido_name FROM conquest_map cm JOIN region r ON cm.region_id = r.region_id WHERE cm.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY r.sido_name
SELECT DISTINCT r.sido_name FROM conquest_map cm JOIN region r ON cm.region_id = r.region_id WHERE cm.member_id = #{memberId} AND cm.trip_place_id IS NULL ORDER BY r.sido_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conquest_map (conquest_map_id, member_id, region_id, conquest_date) SELECT SEQ_CONQUEST_MAP_ID.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, r.region_id, SYSDATE FROM region r WHERE r.sido_name = #{sidoName} AND r.api_sigungu_code IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM conquest_map cm WHERE cm.member_id = #{memberId} AND cm.region_id = r.region_id AND cm.trip_place_id IS NULL ) AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.select: SELECT r.RESERVATION_ID AS "reservationId", r.ROOM_ID AS "roomId", r.CHECK_IN_DATE AS "checkIn", r.CHECK_OUT_DATE AS "checkOut", r.STATUS AS "status", p.PLACE_NAME AS "accommodationName", p.ADDRESS AS "address", rm.ROOM_NAME AS "roomName" FROM RESERVATION r JOIN ROOM rm ON r.ROOM_ID = rm.ROOM_ID JOIN ACCOMMODATION a ON rm.PLACE_ID = a.PLACE_ID JOIN PLACE p ON a.PLACE_ID = p.PLACE_ID WHERE r.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY r.CHECK_IN_DATE DESC
